message:
fix(release-gate): use additive budget accounting and report actual passed_checks on timeout

The subtraction-based budget tracking caused false GATE_TIMEOUT when
total check cost exactly equaled the configured budget (saturating_sub
hit zero). Switch to additive budget_consumed_ms with strict > comparison.

Also fix build_timeout_result to count actually-passed checks from
partial_checks instead of hardcoding passed_checks=0. Two new tests
verify exact-budget-equals-cost passes and timeout preserves correct
passed count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
